top_headline: TRIPLE CATALYST MORNING — CPI 3.7% est at 8:30 ET; Warsh Fed Board vote today; Trump departs Beijing with 17 CEOs
chapters: I · MACRO — CPI April 3.7% YoY est (8:30 ET); biggest since Jan 2024; oil-driven +40bp vs March 3.3%; Core 2.7%
I · MACRO — Warsh Fed Board vote today (cloture 49-44 May 11); Chair vote this week; Powell exits May 15; zero cuts in 2026
II · AI TRADE — NVDA $214 AH T-8 to May 20; $78.5B rev / $1.76 EPS consensus; $725B hyperscaler capex; copper record $14,000+/t
III · GEOPOLITICS — Trump departs Beijing today; 17 CEOs (Musk, Cook, Fink); Iran agenda primary; trade truce modest extension
III · GEOPOLITICS — Brent $104.97 +0.7% overnight; ceasefire 'massive life support'; 100M bbl/week supply loss; Aramco CEO warning
IV · MARKETS — SPX/NDX/RUT all ATH May 11 (7,412/26,274/2,868); AMD +8.7% wk to $458; copper record; NVDA -3.4% AH; PLTR -2.2%
V · TRACK RECORD — No-005 (7 May) 3-day review: AMD +8.69% WIN / DIS -2.49% LOSS / BRENT SHORT -2.95% LOSS / 1W 2L avg +1.08%

flagged_setups.thesis: Pre-earnings entry at $214.34 AH (T-8 to May 20 Q1 FY2027 report). Consensus: $78.5B revenue +78.2% YoY, EPS $1.76 +116.9% YoY. AMD $10.25B Q1 +38% validates merchant silicon DC demand; hyperscaler $725B capex 2026 (+77%) is the strongest demand floor since 2024. Goldman $250 PT, consensus $272, 37/37 Strong Buy. Risk: PLTR-style valuation selloff even on beat; China export control wildcard from Beijing summit; NVDA historically falls more often than rises post-earnings even on beats.
flagged_setups.price_note: $214.34 NVDA pre-market May 12 2026 — Yahoo Finance / MarketChameleon premarket VWAP
